module.name: Resolution
module.description: The single mechanic that resolves all uncertain outcomes: roll d20, add modifier, compare to DC; degree of success or failure determines what happens next.

concepts.name: Check
concepts.owns: Whether an action succeeds or fails and by how much — the core resolution decision.

concepts.name: Degree
concepts.owns: How far above or below DC a result landed — drives what consequence applies.

epic.name: Resolve **Check**
epic.statement: **Player** or **GM** calls for a **Check** when an outcome is uncertain; **System** compares result to **DifficultyClass** and returns a **Degree**.
epic.pre_condition: Given an action with uncertain outcome is declared; And a **DifficultyClass** or opposing **Defense** is set

stories.name: Make Skill **Check**
stories.trigger: **Player** declares a skill action and rolls **Check**
stories.response: **System** compares to **DifficultyClass** and returns **Degree**

stories.name: Resist **Effect**
stories.trigger: **System** triggers resistance **Check** when **Effect** targets **Character**
stories.response: **System** applies **Condition** based on **Degree** of failure

stories.name: Make Opposed **Check**
stories.trigger: **Player** rolls **Check** against another **Character**'s active **Check**
stories.response: **System** compares both results and returns winner by margin

module.name: Character
module.description: The aggregate root holding all hero traits and resources — purchased within a Power Point budget constrained by Power Level caps; also owns the hero point pool, complications, and extra effort.

concepts.name: Character
concepts.owns: Whether the sheet is valid — total cost within budget and all Power Level caps met.

concepts.name: PowerLevel
concepts.owns: The cap on combined attack+effect and defense+resistance trait pairs — enforces game balance.

concepts.name: HeroPoint
concepts.owns: What the player can trade it for — re-roll, condition recovery, inspiration, or counter attempt.

concepts.name: Complication
concepts.owns: When invoked, creates a story problem for the character; triggers award of a HeroPoint.

concepts.name: ExtraEffort
concepts.owns: [defer] — extra effort trades fatigue for a bonus action or enhanced effect; interacts with HeroPoint recovery. chunk: 4cd63373be61

epic.name: Build **Character**
epic.statement: **Player** allocates **PowerPoints** across traits within **PowerLevel** caps; **System** validates the sheet is legal.
epic.pre_condition: Given **PowerLevel** is set; And **PowerPoints** budget is established

stories.name: Select **Complication**
stories.trigger: **Player** chooses **Complications** for the **Character**
stories.response: **System** records them; no PP cost

stories.name: Validate **Character** Sheet
stories.trigger: **Player** submits completed **Character** for validation
stories.response: **System** checks total cost and **PowerLevel** caps; returns valid or violations

stories.name: Advance **Character**
stories.trigger: **Player** spends awarded **PowerPoints** on new or improved traits
stories.response: **System** applies costs and revalidates **PowerLevel** caps

stories.name: Spend **HeroPoint**
stories.trigger: **Player** spends a **HeroPoint** at a moment of need
stories.response: **System** applies the chosen benefit — re-roll, recovery, inspiration, or counter

stories.name: Earn **HeroPoint** from **Complication**
stories.trigger: **GM** invokes a **Character**'s **Complication** to create a story problem
stories.response: **System** awards one **HeroPoint** to the **Player**

stories.name: Use Extra Effort [defer]
stories.trigger: **Player** declares extra effort to enhance an action
stories.response: **System** grants bonus; applies fatigue cost — full mechanics deferred to Step 2

module.name: Character Traits
module.description: The purchased traits that define what a character can do — abilities, defenses, skills, and advantages — all bought from the same Power Point budget and subject to Power Level caps.

concepts.name: Ability
concepts.owns: The modifier contributed to its associated checks and derived defense values.

properties.definition: EnumType name {Strength, Stamina, Agility, Dexterity, Fighting, Intellect, Awareness, Presence}

concepts.name: Defense
concepts.owns: The difficulty class attackers must beat, and whether it is active or impaired by a Condition.

properties.definition: EnumType type {Dodge, Parry, Fortitude, Toughness, Will}

concepts.name: Skill
concepts.owns: The trained bonus added to a specific ability check; whether a check can be made untrained.

concepts.name: Advantage
concepts.owns: The specific rule or tradeoff it grants — combat modifier, fortune effect, or general capability.

epic.name: Configure **Character Traits**
epic.statement: **Player** purchases **Ability** ranks, **Skills**, and **Advantages** with **PowerPoints**; **System** derives **Defense** values and validates **PowerLevel** compliance.
epic.pre_condition: Given **Character** exists with **PowerLevel** set and **PowerPoints** available

stories.name: Set **Ability** Rank
stories.trigger: **Player** assigns rank to an **Ability**
stories.response: **System** deducts cost and recalculates derived **Defense** values

stories.name: Train **Skill**
stories.trigger: **Player** spends **PowerPoints** on **Skill** ranks
stories.response: **System** records rank; adds to linked **Ability** modifier for that skill's checks

stories.name: Select **Advantage**
stories.trigger: **Player** picks an **Advantage** during creation or advancement
stories.response: **System** records it and applies the rule or tradeoff it grants

stories.name: Apply **Condition** to **Defense**
stories.trigger: **Character** gains Vulnerable or Defenseless **Condition**
stories.response: **System** halves active **Defense** ranks (Vulnerable) or sets to 0 (Defenseless)

module.name: Powers
module.description: The system for defining extraordinary abilities: named Effects purchased at a per-rank cost, adjusted by Extras and Flaws, constrained by PowerLevel caps.

concepts.name: Power
concepts.owns: The final per-rank cost after extras and flaws, and whether the effect is currently active.

properties.definition: EnumType action {standard, move, free, reaction, none}
EnumType duration {instant, concentration, sustained, continuous, permanent}

concepts.name: Effect
concepts.owns: What resistance check type applies, what DC the effect sets, and what happens on each degree of failure.

properties.definition: EnumType resistance_check {Dodge, Fortitude, Toughness, Will, none}
Effect subtypes [defer] — the named effects (Affliction, Damage, Healing, Move Object, etc.) exist as distinct mechanics; full taxonomy deferred to Step 2. chunk: d4cad3e10e05

concepts.name: Modifier
concepts.owns: How much it adjusts the effect's cost per rank — adding (Extra) or subtracting (Flaw).

epic.name: Build **Power**
epic.statement: **Player** selects an **Effect**, sets rank, and applies **Modifiers** to define a **Power** within **PowerPoints** budget and **PowerLevel** caps.
epic.pre_condition: Given **Character** has unspent **PowerPoints**; And **PowerLevel** is set

stories.name: Select and Rank **Effect**
stories.trigger: **Player** chooses an **Effect** and sets its rank
stories.response: **System** calculates base cost and validates against **PowerLevel** cap for attack effects

stories.name: Apply **Extra** to **Effect**
stories.trigger: **Player** applies an **Extra** to enhance the **Effect**
stories.response: **System** increases cost per rank by the Extra's adjustment

stories.name: Apply **Flaw** to **Effect**
stories.trigger: **Player** applies a **Flaw** to accept a limitation
stories.response: **System** reduces cost per rank by the Flaw's adjustment (minimum 1)

stories.name: Build **Power** Array
stories.trigger: **Player** groups **Effects** under a shared base cost
stories.response: **System** prices base at highest Effect cost; each alternate costs 1PP

stories.name: Activate **Effect** in Play [defer]
stories.trigger: **Character** uses a **Power** during a scene
stories.response: **System** resolves **Effect** against target — full activation mechanics deferred to Step 2

module.name: Combat
module.description: The structured exchange of attacks, defenses, and conditions — initiative, action economy, attack resolution, and condition accumulation.

concepts.name: Action
concepts.owns: Which type a character can take on their turn and what it can accomplish.

properties.definition: EnumType type {standard, move, free, reaction, none}

concepts.name: Condition
concepts.owns: What actions become unavailable at each severity level and how recovery progresses.

properties.definition: EnumType severity {impaired, disabled, staggered, incapacitated, dying, dead}

epic.name: Resolve Combat Exchange
epic.statement: **Player** or **GM** declares an **Action** targeting another **Character**; **System** resolves the **Check** sequence and applies the resulting **Condition** or state change.
epic.pre_condition: Given **Character** has an **Action** available this turn; And a valid target exists

stories.name: Make Attack
stories.trigger: **Player** declares attack **Action** and rolls attack **Check**
stories.response: **System** compares to **Defense** class; if hit, triggers resistance **Check**

stories.name: Resist Damage
stories.trigger: **System** triggers Toughness **Check** against damage **Effect** DC
stories.response: **System** applies **Condition** per **Degree** of failure on Toughness **Check**

stories.name: Execute Maneuver
stories.trigger: **Player** declares a combat maneuver as part of attack **Action**
stories.response: **System** applies the tradeoff (attack/defense/effect adjustment) before resolving **Check**

stories.name: Recover from **Condition**
stories.trigger: **Player** takes Recover **Action** or **Character** rests between scenes
stories.response: **System** removes one **Condition** step immediately or per minute of rest

open_questions: [uncertain] Effect subtypes — the named effects (Affliction, Damage, Healing, Move Object, Teleport, etc.) each have distinct mechanics. Should they be modeled as subtypes of Effect or as an enum? Needs targeted chunk reading in Step 2. chunk: d4cad3e10e05

[defer] ExtraEffort full mechanics — evidence exists (extra effort trades fatigue for bonus action/enhanced effect) but interaction with HeroPoint recovery and Conditions not fully read. chunk: 4cd63373be61
[defer] Activate Effect in play — Power has activate() operation but the full resolution sequence (countering, sustained maintenance, concentration) not read in depth. chunk: 05f80df9e48f
[uncertain] Gamemastering — NPC creation uses same Character rules; encounter design and series tone are GM guidance not domain concepts. Probably no module needed but confirm before Step 2.

[uncertain] Equipment and Gear — devices are Powers with Removable flaw (already in Powers); pure equipment comes from the Equipment Advantage (already in Character Traits). Likely no separate module needed.
cross_cutting_notes: PowerLevel [cross-cutting] — Character (budget owner) + Powers (cap enforcement on effect rank). Resolution (Check + Degree) [cross-cutting] — every module depends on it; model first. HeroPoint [cross-cutting] — Character (pool owner) + Complication (award trigger) + Advantage/Fortune (spend interaction). Condition [cross-cutting] — Combat (applied by damage) + Character Traits/Defense (impairs active defenses) + Character (ExtraEffort fatigue).
